title: Vacancy for Real Estate Agent at Tata Housing Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Real Estate Agent at Tata Housing Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
We at Tata Housing Consulting Pvt Ltd are looking for an experienced Real Estate Agent based out of Dhanbad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Tata Housing Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Tata Housing Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Housing Consulting Pvt Ltd!
